'''âs-v-ch''' ('''kasavach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrogalvanize|electrogalvanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrogalvanize|electrogalvanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kasavach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisavach|thisavach]] || [[word:jisavach|jisavach]] || [[word:shisavach|shisavach]] || [[word:kisavach|kisavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusavach|thuthusavach]] || [[word:jujusavach|jujusavach]] || [[word:shushusavach|shushusavach]] || [[word:kukusavach|kukusavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusavach|thusavach]] || [[word:jusavach|jusavach]] || [[word:shusavach|shusavach]] || [[word:kusavach|kusavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusavach|thusavach]] || [[word:jusavach|jusavach]] || [[word:shusavach|shusavach]] || [[word:kusavach|kusavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesavach|thesavach]] || [[word:jesavach|jesavach]] || [[word:shesavach|shesavach]] || [[word:kesavach|kesavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosavach|thothosavach]] || [[word:jojosavach|jojosavach]] || [[word:shoshosavach|shoshosavach]] || [[word:kokosavach|kokosavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosavach|thosavach]] || [[word:josavach|josavach]] || [[word:shosavach|shosavach]] || [[word:kosavach|kosavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosavach|thosavach]] || [[word:josavach|josavach]] || [[word:shosavach|shosavach]] || [[word:kosavach|kosavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsavach|thĂŠsavach]] || [[word:jĂŠsavach|jĂŠsavach]] || [[word:shĂŠsavach|shĂŠsavach]] || [[word:kĂŠsavach|kĂŠsavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasavach|thathasavach]] || [[word:jajasavach|jajasavach]] || [[word:shashasavach|shashasavach]] || [[word:kakasavach|kakasavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasavach|thasavach]] || [[word:jasavach|jasavach]] || [[word:shasavach|shasavach]] || [[word:kasavach|kasavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasavach|thasavach]] || [[word:jasavach|jasavach]] || [[word:shasavach|shasavach]] || [[word:kasavach|kasavach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasavach|shasavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasavach|goshasavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasavach|gokishasavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasavachnĂŒ|shasavachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasavachnknĂŒ|goshasavachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavachnĂŒ|gokishasavachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasavachshĂ«|shasavachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasavachnkshĂ«|goshasavachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasavachshĂ«|gokishasavachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavachro|shasavachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavachnkro|goshasavachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavachro|gokishasavachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavachmu|shasavachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavachnkmu|goshasavachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavachmu|gokishasavachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasavachsher|shasavachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasavachnksher|goshasavachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasavachsher|gokishasavachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasavachng|shasavachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasavachnkng|goshasavachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasavachng|gokishasavachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasavachya|shasavachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasavachnkya|goshasavachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasavachya|gokishasavachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasavachyam|shasavachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasavachnkyam|goshasavachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasavachyam|gokishasavachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasavachnĂŒshĂ«|shasavachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasavachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasavachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasavachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasavachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavachnĂŒro|shasavachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavachnknĂŒro|goshasavachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavachnĂŒro|gokishasavachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavachnĂŒmu|shasavachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavachnknĂŒmu|goshasavachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavachnĂŒmu|gokishasavachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasavachshĂ«nĂŒ|shasavachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasavachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasavachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasavachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavachshĂ«ro|shasavachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavachnkshĂ«ro|goshasavachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavachshĂ«ro|gokishasavachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavachshĂ«mu|shasavachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavachnkshĂ«mu|goshasavachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavachshĂ«mu|gokishasavachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasavachronĂŒ|shasavachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasavachnkronĂŒ|goshasavachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavachronĂŒ|gokishasavachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasavachroshĂ«|shasavachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasavachnkroshĂ«|goshasavachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasavachroshĂ«|gokishasavachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasavachromu|shasavachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasavachnkromu|goshasavachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasavachromu|gokishasavachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasavachmunĂŒ|shasavachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasavachnkmunĂŒ|goshasavachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasavachmunĂŒ|gokishasavachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasavachmushĂ«|shasavachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasavachnkmushĂ«|goshasavachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasavachmushĂ«|gokishasavachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasavachmuro|shasavachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasavachnkmuro|goshasavachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasavachmuro|gokishasavachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
